candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
下列离子方程式中,书写正确的是( )
A. $\ce{2Na(s) + 2HCl(aq) -> 2NaCl(aq) + H2(g)}$
B. $\ce{Zn(s) + 2HCl(aq) -> ZnCl2(aq) + H2(g)}$
C. $\ce{CaCO3(s) + 2HCl(aq) -> CaCl2(aq) + H2O(l) + CO2(g)}$
D. $\ce{2Al(s) + 6HCl(aq) -> 2AlCl3(aq) + 3H2(g)}$
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: Use inert electrode electrolytic chlorine solution: $2\text{Cl}^-(aq)\rightarrow\text{Cl}_2(g)+2\text{e}^-$
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
